sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: The board changed after clicking on [31,31]. Let me compare the before and after frames to see what changed. I need to check last_transition to see the diff.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Compare before and after the click
before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation['nodes']
after = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation['nodes']

print("BEFORE nodes:")
for n in before:
    print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, hash={n['hash']}, center~{[(b[0] for b in n['boundary'])]}, children={n['children']}")

print("\nAFTER nodes:")
for n in after:
    print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, hash={n['hash']}, center~{[(b[0] for b in n['boundary'])]}, children={n['children']}")

# Find differences
before_colors = {n['id']: n['color'] for n in before}
after_colors = {n['id']: n['color'] for n in after}
before_pixels = {n['id']: n['pixels'] for n in before}
after_pixels = {n['id']: n['pixels'] for n in after}

print("\nColor changes:")
for i in set(list(before_colors.keys()) + list(after_colors.keys())):
    bc = before_colors.get(i, '?')
    ac = after_colors.get(i, '?')
    if bc != ac:
        print(f"  Node {i}: {bc} -> {ac}")

print("\nPixel count changes:")
for i in set(list(before_pixels.keys()) + list(after_pixels.keys())):
    bp = before_pixels.get(i, '?')
    ap = after_pixels.get(i, '?')
    if bp != ap:
        print(f"  Node {i}: {bp} -> {ap}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
